data.body: B1 CODE complete + all gates green locally (lint, typecheck, full reconciler+config suite 1233 passed). Files: _config_schema.py (flag+coercer), outbound_differ.py (OutboundDiffConfig field + thread local_id/flag through _compute_outbound_update_mutation -> _diff_fields), outbound_fields.py (_diff_fields arbitration_prev: Site A + all 3 Site B prev_jira_fields uses swap to baseline under flag; OFF = byte-for-byte), run_differs.py (read flag once/pass -> OutboundDiffConfig; census rename binding_walk_census->decision_census w/ rollback comment), baseline_shadow.py (RECON stderr emission for streak derivation), docs/jira-sync-setup.md (flag+flip/rollback+why-no-classifier-alert). Tests: test_baseline_consumer_swap.py (6: Site A suppression, Site B conflict-on-baseline, flag-OFF safety, None->local-wins, summary asymmetry pinned, OutboundDiffConfig field), config-parse (2: default False + TOML round-trip proving coercer), baseline_shadow RECON capture (1). IMPL NOTE/deviation: the flag is read ONCE per pass in run_differs._run_differs_outbound (via load_config, mirroring the sibling max_acting_fraction read) and set on OutboundDiffConfig — NOT threaded through reconcile.py/ctx as the Round-5 narrative suggested; this satisfies the binding AC (run_differs sets it on OutboundDiffConfig from config) and is more self-contained. reconcile.py therefore not edited. OPERATIONAL gate (>=10 clean shadow passes ~3+hrs, live heal, flag flip) remains for a future session — B1 stays OPEN after the code lands.
